  generate-prefab-packages
    exec-prefab 245ms
  generate-prefab-packages completed in 250ms
  execute-generate-process
    exec-configure 445ms
    [gap of 15ms]
  execute-generate-process completed in 461ms
generate_cxx_metadata completed in 722ms
